cannot_score_reason: This is an instructional/educational video demonstrating the Adult Pyeloplasty physical module on a LAPARO trainer. The content shows animated title slides and instructional demonstration of suturing/knot-tying technique on a foam appendage model, but does NOT constitute a timed performance by a trainee that can be scored using official FLS rubric.

frame_analyses.description: Opening title slide: 'ADULT PYELOPLASTY - PHYSICAL MODULE' with LAPARO Medical Simulators logo
Wide view of LAPARO trainer box showing foam appendage (pale cream/tan) and suturing instruments positioned. Camera view is through endoscopic lens.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper trainer setup and instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper manipulates foam appendage; right instrument (knot pusher or grasper) begins approach with green-marked ligating loop visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper loop approach angle and grasper positioning

frame_analyses.description: Loop is being positioned around the base of the foam appendage; green marks on loop align with target placement zone
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows correct centering of loop on appendage

frame_analyses.description: Right instrument cinches loop tightly; foam appendage shows red surface indicating contact/tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates smooth cinching motion and firm knot tightening

frame_analyses.description: Suture tails visible extending from cinched loop; instruments position to cut excess suture material
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows final cleanup phase with suture tail cutting

demonstrated_techniques: Proper grasper positioning for appendage stabilization
Ligating loop deployment with controlled trajectory
Smooth cinching motion with appropriate tension
One-handed loop manipulation while stabilizing with contralateral grasper
common_errors_addressed: Maintaining loop position during cinch to prevent slippage
Avoiding over-tensioning that could transect appendage
Ensuring loop is seated at marked line before final tightening

confidence_rationale: Video clearly marked as 'PHYSICAL MODULE' with LAPARO branding. Title slides and continuous demonstration without pause, reset, or timed performance indicate instructional content. No performance timing, no trainee error patterns, no actual scoring context—purely educational demonstration.
summary: This is an instructional video demonstrating proper Endoloop technique on a LAPARO Adult Pyeloplasty trainer. It is NOT a trainee performance and therefore cannot be scored using official FLS rubric. The content effectively demonstrates expert-level technique including loop deployment, positioning, cinching, and tail cutting phases.
